---
title: "#other-distros"
format: gfm
---

## 2023-10-30

**Vince Carey** (12:24:03):
> @Vince Carey has joined the channel

**Vince Carey** (12:38:23):
> set the channel description: This channel is created to discuss the fact that Bioconductor software is redistributed by a number of projects including macports and conda.  Sometimes the assets shipped are not the most appropriate ones.  How can we enhance user experiences?


## 2023-11-07

**Maria Doyle** (16:54:11):
> @Maria Doyle has joined the channel

**Björn Grüning** (16:59:23):
> @Björn Grüning has joined the channel

**Maria Doyle** (17:00:02):
> Welcome@Björn Grüning! You’re officially member number three in this exclusive club:smile:. We’re gathering a small but mighty team here to tackle the challenge of enhancing user experiences with redistributed Bioconductor software, and your conda expertise is just what we need.


## 2024-05-14

**Lori Shepherd** (12:43:51):
> archived the channel
